debug_info.goal:
pbar : Pose
S : Euc(3)
w : Euc(2)
z1 : HasFDerivAt (fun x => (rotprojRM (x.ofLp 1) (x.ofLp 2) (x.ofLp 0)) S) (GlobalTheorem.rotprojRM' S) pbar.innerParams
⊢ GlobalTheorem.rotproj_inner' pbar S w =
    (fderivInnerCLM ℝ
          ((rotprojRM (pbar.innerParams.ofLp 1) (pbar.innerParams.ofLp 2) (pbar.innerParams.ofLp 0)) S, w)).comp
      (ContinuousLinearMap.prod (GlobalTheorem.rotprojRM' S) 0)

failed_attempts:
ext v
    simp only [rotproj_inner', ContinuousLinearMap.comp_apply, ContinuousLinearMap.prod_apply,
      fderivInnerCLM_apply, Prod.snd_zero, inner_zero_right, add_zero,
      ContinuousLinearMap.coe_coe, Basis.constr_apply_fintype, EuclideanSpace.basisFun_apply,
      map_sum, inner_sum]
    congr
  rw [step]
  exact HasFDerivAt.inner z1 (hasFDerivAt_const _ _)
